release_notes: 🐛 CRITICAL: account_backup moved to %APPDATA%\FRT — no more Access Denied in Program Files
🐛 CRITICAL: Accounts no longer disappear after restart when installed to Program Files
🐛 Fixed _PROJECT_ROOT resolving to temp folder in frozen EXE
🐛 Fixed imported accounts disappearing after restart
🐛 Fixed VPN loading dialog flash before connect dialog
✨ VPN app sent to background after successful connection
🐛 Fixed Stop button in automation tab not stopping the process
🐛 Fixed uiautomator dump timeout with retry logic
🐛 Fixed Facebook URL not opening target post
🛑 Stop now sends Facebook to background on all devices
